User-agent: *
Allow: /

# Block admin / staff / customer portal areas from indexing.
Disallow: /admin/
Disallow: /staff/
Disallow: /customer/
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /auth/

# Block auth / transactional / utility flows (also marked noindex via meta).
Disallow: /checkout
Disallow: /get-quote
Disallow: /install
Disallow: /login
Disallow: /register
Disallow: /thank-you
Disallow: /unsubscribe

Sitemap: https://mpgsolution.com/sitemap.xml
